verses.1: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good,
verses.2: Give thanks to the God of gods,
verses.3: Give thanks to the Lord of lords,
verses.4: to him who alone does great wonders,
verses.5: to him who by understanding made the heavens,
verses.6: to him who spread out the earth above the waters,
verses.7: to him who made the great lights,
verses.8: the sun to rule by day,
verses.9: the moon and stars to rule by night,
verses.10: to him who struck down the Egyptian firstborn,
verses.11: and brought out Israel from among them,
verses.12: with a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm,
verses.13: to him who divided the Red Sea apart,
verses.14: and made Israel to pass through the middle of it,
verses.15: but overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea,
verses.16: to him who led his people through the wilderness,
verses.17: to him who struck great kings,
verses.21: and gave their land as an inheritance,
verses.22: even a heritage to Israel his servant,
verses.23: who remembered us in our low estate,
verses.24: and has delivered us from our adversaries,
verses.25: who gives food to every creature,
verses.26: Oh give thanks to the God of heaven,
